changelog:
## What's Changed (since v0.1.0)

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- crash logs writer, profile path, LSPosed pause sync, UI polish 

### ⚙️ CI/CD
- use assembleDebug for Build APK step — avoid release signing requirement 

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- FileObserver API 29+ lint error — mask constructor guarded by SDK version check 

### 🚀 Features
- v0.1.0 feature batch — crash viewer, profile management, pause UI, accessibility service improvements 

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- add missing onInterrupt() and fix createWindowManager usage (a11y)

### 🚀 Features
- add AccessibilityService overlay trusted overlay mode for Android 12+ 

### 🧹 Chores
- add xda_post.md to gitignore 
- bump org.jetbrains.compose from 1.11.0 to 1.11.1 (deps)
- bump plugin.compose from 2.3.21 to 2.4.0 (deps)
- bump multiplatform from 2.3.21 to 2.4.0 (deps)

### ⚙️ CI/CD
- skip duplicate release guard when force_version=true (release)

### 📚 Documentation
- rewrite pull request template to production quality 

### ⚙️ CI/CD
- fix YAML syntax - replace heredocs breaking block scalar indentation (release)
- remove hardcoded testing phase banner from workflow (release)

### 📚 Documentation
- fix inaccurate 'pressure' references - capacitive screens measure contact area, not force 
- fill unreleased section with actual changes (changelog)

### 🧹 Chores
- remove PROMOTION.md from tracking, add to gitignore 

### ⚙️ CI/CD
- add testing-phase banner and grouped changelog to release notes (release)

### 📚 Documentation
- rewrite issue templates for better bug reports 
- add user acquisition strategy guide 
- add subpages for getting started, troubleshooting, FAQ, and advanced usage 
- rewrite BUILD, CONTRIBUTING, and SECURITY guides to production quality 
- rewrite README and CHANGELOG to production quality 

### 🧹 Chores
- add FUNDING and stale issue management configs 

### ⚙️ CI/CD
- add assembleRelease build step with APK artifact upload 

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- update config path and add APK integrity check (module)
- harden hook with lsposed_mode support and fix empty catch blocks (source)

### 📚 Documentation
- rewrite contributing and security docs to production quality 
- rewrite technical documentation to production quality 
- rewrite README and CHANGELOG to production quality 
- rewrite build documentation to production quality 
- rewrite issue and PR templates to production quality 

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- escape release notes markdown properly in update.json (workflow)

___
### 📥 Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) – or Overlay Mode (no framework) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 101 |

### 🆘 Support
- **Issues**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/issues
- **Security**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/security/advisories
- **Documentation**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker#readme
